sprintGoal: Use 1-3 low-friction external channels to collect the first real user signals for ENHE AI Prompt Kit. Do not fabricate publication status, URLs, metrics, revenue, refunds, or feedback.

priorityAssets.publishingGoal: Reach 10 real potential users one by one and learn whether the AI tool site operations prompt kit is worth reviewing, buying, or rejecting.
priorityAssets.copyTitle: AI工具站运营 Prompt Pack 私聊触达话术
priorityAssets.copyBody: 我做了一个 AI 工具站运营 Prompt Pack 验证页，想找 3-5 个真实运营者看一下：是否需要一套能直接复制改写的产品页、FAQ、SEO/GEO、上架和周复盘 Prompt。如果你愿意，我发你链接，看看到底有没有用。不承诺收益或增长，只验证需求。
priorityAssets.callToAction: 回复 yes 我发验证页，或直接说不需要。
priorityAssets.complianceNotice: 只触达认识的真实潜在用户；用户拒绝后停止继续触达；不记录隐私敏感内容；不承诺收入、排名或自动增长。
priorityAssets.userMinimumAction: 选择 10 个真实潜在用户，逐个私聊发送话术和验证页链接，并记录真实回复。
decisionCriteria: If at least 2 users ask for details or preview, keep this direction active.
If at least 1 user pays or asks pricing, prioritize checkout and delivery readiness.
If most replies are negative or confused, rewrite the value proposition before scaling.

priorityAssets.publishingGoal: Post once to a private traffic channel and collect real replies, leads, and purchase intent from known contacts.
priorityAssets.copyTitle: AI Prompt Kit：给 AI 工具站的运营提示词包
priorityAssets.copyBody: 我上线了一个 AI 工具站运营 Prompt Pack 验证页，覆盖产品页文案、FAQ、SEO/GEO、上架文案、竞品分析和周复盘。如果你正在做 AI 工具、数字产品或独立项目，可以帮我看下这个方向是否有价值。数据只记录真实咨询、回复、订单、收入和反馈。
priorityAssets.callToAction: 有兴趣的话打开验证页，或直接微信回复我。
priorityAssets.complianceNotice: 只记录数量和匿名反馈摘要；不导出聊天记录；不记录隐私敏感内容；不承诺收入、排名或自动增长。
priorityAssets.userMinimumAction: 发一条朋友圈或微信群消息，并在 24 小时后记录真实私信、正向回复、负向回复、订单和收入。
decisionCriteria: If at least 3 real replies arrive, keep WeChat as a validation channel.
If replies ask what is included, improve the landing page and sample preview.
If there are no replies after 24 hours, test manual outreach before repeating the same WeChat copy.

priorityAssets.publishingGoal: Publish one note to test whether public content can generate views, saves, shares, private messages, or leads.
priorityAssets.copyTitle: 我把 AI 工具站运营拆成了一套 Prompt 包
priorityAssets.copyBody: 适合独立开发者、AI 工具站运营者、数字产品卖家。这是一个 AI 工具站运营 Prompt Pack 验证页，覆盖产品页、FAQ、SEO/GEO、上架文案、竞品分析和周复盘。当前只验证需求，不承诺排名、收入或自动增长。真实判断看笔记浏览、收藏、分享、私信、线索和用户反馈。
priorityAssets.callToAction: 想要预览的话，打开验证页或私信我。
priorityAssets.complianceNotice: 不要刷量；不要把平台不可见数据写成已发生；只记录小红书后台或真实私信中能看到的数据。
priorityAssets.userMinimumAction: 手动发布 1 篇小红书笔记，并在 24 小时后记录真实浏览、收藏、分享、私信和线索。
decisionCriteria: If views are non-zero but no saves or messages, improve the hook and content proof.
If saves or messages appear, keep testing public content.
If a user asks for preview or price, move that lead into validation intake.

userMinimumActions.action: Post one WeChat Moments or group message using the WeChat copy.
Send the manual outreach copy to 10 real potential users one by one.
Publish one Xiaohongshu note using the Xiaohongshu copy.
Optional: create a compliant Xianyu listing only if delivery and refund handling are ready.
Optional: create a compliant Taobao listing only if product delivery, support, and refund flow are ready.
Optional: create a Whop listing or waitlist only in an authorized account environment.

userMustFill: publishedUrl when the channel provides a real URL
observed metrics from the platform or real users
evidence references such as screenshot filename or public URL
resultInputUpdateGuide.publishedTrueWhen: Only when the channel was actually posted, listed, sent, or used for real outreach.
resultInputUpdateGuide.hasRealSignalsTrueWhen: At least one channel has real publication status, real messages, real views, real orders, real revenue, real feedback, or real evidence.
resultInputUpdateGuide.canBackfillTrueWhen: The result input is valid, has real signals, and has no blocker such as paidOrders greater than orders, refundCount greater than paidOrders, or refundedAmount greater than revenue.

safetyWarnings: Do not invent views, clicks, saves, shares, messages, leads, orders, revenue, refunds, or user feedback.
Do not set published=true until a real publishing or outreach action happened.
Do not log in to external platforms without explicit user authorization.
Do not read or print passwords, cookies, tokens, or secret values.
If there is no real publishing result, keep EBOS in waiting_real_data.
